name: Claude 1
note: Anthropic's first public model; brought Constitutional AI training to a commercial product. Retired Nov 2024.

results.notes: LMSYS Chatbot Arena Elo, 2nd place overall at the time

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: announced March 14, 2023 alongside Claude Instant (per Anthropic's own announcement and multiple retrospectives). Context window of 9,000 tokens and pricing of $11.02/$32.68 per M tokens confirmed verbatim by directly reading the official Anthropic pricing PDF (apr-pricing-tokens_2023-05-10 -- table explicitly lists 'Claude-v1: 9,000 tokens, Prompt $11.02/M, Completion $32.68/M'). Arena Elo 1195 (2nd place) confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of the cited lmsys.org blog post. Retirement Nov 2024 confirmed via multiple independent sources (Anthropic deprecation notices, Sept 4 2024 notice, retired Nov 6 2024). No changes made.
